heading: Tuesday Night
text: Partly cloudy south. Becoming mostly cloudy north, with scattered snow showers or flurries from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward, mainly over high terrain. Lows from the mid 20s to around 30 south and in the Champlain Valley, low to mid 20s elsewhere north. West winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming light and variable east of the Greens

heading: Wednesday
text: Variable clouds. Chance of early snow showers from the Adirondacks and Route 2 northward. Highs from the mid 40s to around 50 south, and upper 30s to lower 40s north, with some mid 30s far north. West to northwest winds 5 to 10 mph, becoming southwest in southern areas, and in the Champlain Valley.

heading: Wednesday Night
text: Cloudy. Chance of snow or rain showers. Lows from the mid 20s to around 30 north, and low to mid 30s in the south. Winds variable to southeast at around 5 mph, except becoming south 5 to 10 mph late in the Champlain Valley.
